【Shatterproof & Long-Lasting Quality】Built with nano tempered glass and a solid aluminum alloy frame, this floor mirror is stronger and safer than ordinary glass. It’s shatter-resistant, fade-proof, and durable, ensuring years of crystal-clear reflection without worry.

Wall & Stand: Full body mirror can be used in a variety of ways, it can be stand on the floor, leaned against the wall, or hung on the wall without taking up more space, in addition, it is equipped with a screws kit, which allows the mirror to be fixed firmly to avoid falling off by touching it.

No Assembly Required: Floor mirror comes out of the box ready to use, no assembly required. Easily allows you to use a large, high-definition full body mirror. The frame has texture very thin and you can move it easily. It is suitable for bedroom, living room, checkroom, home gym, all kinds of rooms and so on.
